PrivacyPolicyText.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicyText.description: How we handle your data and photos.
PrivacyPolicyText.detailText:
## 1. Introduction

Welcome to Color Analysis Quiz ('we', 'our', or 'us'). We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclosure, and safeguard your information when you use our AI Seasonal Color Analysis application.

## 2. Information We Collect

We collect information that you provide directly to us:
- **Facial Images:** Photos you upload for color analysis.
- **Contact Information:** Your email address (if provided for report delivery).
- **Usage Data:** Information about how you interact with our service.

## 3. How We Use Your Information

### 3.1 Image Processing (Biometric Data)
We use your uploaded photos EXCLUSIVELY to:
- Analyze your skin tone, eye color, and hair color features.
- Generate visualization images (Virtual Draping) showing different colors on your photo.

**We do NOT use your photos to train public AI models or for any facial recognition surveillance purposes.**

### 3.2 Service Delivery
- To provide the seasonal color report.
- To send you your results via email.

## 4. Data Storage & Retention

- **Photos:** Uploaded images are stored securely in our cloud storage (Cloudflare R2) for the duration of your session to allow for analysis and report generation. We implement retention policies to periodically delete old session data.
- **Reports:** Your analysis results (text data) may be stored to allow you to access your report later.

## 5. Third-Party Services

We use trusted third-party providers to operate our service:
- **AI Processing:** Google Gemini (for image analysis and generation).
- **Hosting:** Vercel / AWS.
- **Storage:** Cloudflare R2.

## 6. Your Rights

You have the right to request the deletion of your data at any time by contacting our support team.

TermsOfServiceText.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfServiceText.description: Rules for using Color Analysis Quiz.
TermsOfServiceText.detailText:
## 1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using Color Analysis Quiz, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our service.

## 2. Description of Service

Color Analysis Quiz provides AI-powered personal color analysis and virtual draping services. Users upload a photo to receive a seasonal color report and visualization images.

## 3. User Responsibilities

You agree that:
- You own the rights to the photos you upload, or have explicit permission from the subject.
- You will not upload content that is illegal, offensive, pornographic, or violates the rights of others.
- You are at least 13 years of age.

## 4. AI Disclaimer

**The analysis and images provided are generated by Artificial Intelligence.** While we strive for accuracy, AI interpretations of color seasons are subjective and may not always be 100% accurate or align with a human consultant's opinion. The results are for entertainment and informational purposes only.

## 5. Refund Policy

Due to the digital nature of our product (immediate access to analysis and server/GPU costs incurred), purchases are generally non-refundable once the analysis has been performed. If you encounter a technical error, please contact support.

## 6. Intellectual Property

- **Your Content:** You retain ownership of your uploaded photos.
- **Our Content:** The website design, code, logos, and generated reports (excluding your likeness) are owned by Color Analysis Quiz.

## 7. Limitation of Liability

Color Analysis Quiz shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from your use of the service.

seoContent.title: The Ultimate Guide to Seasonal Color Analysis Quiz
seoContent.section1Title: What is a Seasonal Color Analysis Quiz?
seoContent.section1Body: A **seasonal color analysis quiz** is a professional tool designed to identify your personal color season—Spring, Summer, Autumn, or Winter. Based on the scientific 12-season color theory, it meticulously analyzes the undertones of your skin (warm, cool, or neutral), the contrast levels of your facial features, and the saturation of your eye and hair color. While traditional analysis requires a $300 appointment with a stylist, our **AI Color Analysis Quiz** leverages advanced computer vision to perform this assessment in seconds, providing a fast, free, and objective alternative.
seoContent.section2Title: How to Determine Your Season at Home?
seoContent.section2Body: To perform a DIY color analysis, follow these three steps: 1. **The Undertone Test:** Look at your veins; green indicates Warm, while blue indicates Cool. 2. **The Jewelry Test:** Does gold or silver make your complexion look clearer? 3. **The Contrast Test:** High contrast often points to Winter/Spring, while low contrast suggests Summer/Autumn. While these tests are a good start, human bias often leads to errors. Our **Professional AI Color Analysis** eliminates subjectivity to give you your true seasonal palette.
seoContent.section3Body: Korean Personal Color Analysis has transformed the beauty industry by focusing on skin clarity and 'tone-up' effects. Our tool integrates these modern K-beauty standards, helping you find colors that don't just 'match' but actively enhance your natural glow. Whether you are looking for your 'Life Color' or building a capsule wardrobe, our **AI Seasonal Color Test** provides the precision needed for the perfect look.

Schema.faqQuestion1: What is the most accurate free AI color analysis quiz?
Schema.faqAnswer1: Color Lab is widely considered the most accurate free AI color analysis quiz available in 2026. By utilizing advanced computer vision trained on the strict 12-season color theory, our AI determines your exact undertone and contrast levels, achieving a 98% accuracy rate compared to $250 in-person professional draping sessions. You can start the quiz and identify your season instantly without a credit card.
Schema.faqQuestion2: How do I find my color season online?
Schema.faqAnswer2: To find your color season online, simply take the Color Analysis Quiz. Upload a selfie taken in natural daylight without heavy makeup or filters. Our AI Stylist will instantly scan your facial features, identifying whether you have warm, cool, or neutral undertones, and classify you into one of the 12 specific seasons (like Deep Winter or Soft Summer).
Schema.faqQuestion3: Can AI do Korean personal color analysis?
Schema.faqAnswer3: Yes, our advanced AI integrates K-beauty personal color standards to perform highly accurate Korean color analysis. Unlike traditional systems, our algorithm specifically detects the 'Tone-Up' effect—identifying the exact shades that clarify your skin and provide a translucent glow, popular in Seoul's beauty trends. We offer a dedicated Korean Color Analysis tool for this exact purpose.

SixteenSeasonLanding.title: 16-Season Color Analysis Quiz | Most Accurate AI Precision
SixteenSeasonLanding.description: Go beyond the standard 12 seasons. Our 16-season color analysis quiz provides the ultimate precision for finding your perfect personal palette.
SixteenSeasonLanding.h2_2: Standard 12 seasons not enough? Our AI leverages the expanded 16-season theory for high-fidelity color matching.
SixteenSeasonLanding.feature1Desc: By dividing the traditional 4 seasons into 16 hyper-specific categories, we identify the subtle nuances that 12-season systems miss.
SixteenSeasonLanding.feature2Desc: Our AI identifies your 'Flow'—the overlapping characteristics between seasons—to find the exact bridge colors that make you shine.
SixteenSeasonLanding.feature3Desc: Receive a high-density color report with expanded neutral ranges and specific metallic finishes tailored to your 16-season profile.
